response.justification: Bogdan has strong full-stack experience and notable geospatial contributions via GISCollective, but lacks direct C++/Rust experience in routing, navigation, or distributed geospatial pipelines — key requirements for the role. His DLang and Node.js background shows systems-level aptitude, but the absence of modern C++ in commercial routing contexts and limited evidence of fault-tolerant data pipeline design raises significant gaps.
strengths: Proven geospatial project experience with GISCollective and Open Green Map
Strong systems-level programming background with DLang and low-latency systems
Demonstrated ability to learn and contribute across diverse tech stacks
concerns: No demonstrated commercial experience with C++ or Rust in routing or navigation systems
Lack of explicit experience with distributed systems, consistency models, or routing tile pipelines
Geospatial work is open-source and non-production-scale, lacking evidence of global reliability engineering
